title: Nurse Pouch - Medical Nurse Organizer Pouch, Double Sided, 7 Pockets, Belt

variation_files.prompt: A full-body portrait of a smiling woman with long, wavy blonde hair, wearing light blue medical scrubs, standing against a plain white background. She is wearing the belt pouch around her waist, positioned at hip level, with the pouch hanging in front. Her right hand is gently resting on the pouch, while her left arm hangs naturally by her side. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting her face and the product without shadows. The composition is centered, with the subject facing slightly toward the viewer, creating a friendly and professional appearance.

A young woman with long, wavy blonde hair is shown from the waist up, wearing light blue medical scrubs. She is standing against a plain white background, facing slightly to the side with a gentle smile, looking toward the camera. Around her waist, she wears the belt pouch, secured with a black adjustable strap that fastens at the side. The pouch hangs naturally at her hip, positioned over the front of her scrubs. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting her features and the clean, professional look of the outfit. The overall composition is clean and focused, emphasizing the practical use of the belt pouch in a healthcare setting.
